message:
feat(fp-frame): str.match/fullmatch case/na option parity (frankenpandas-13ph)

Adds StrAccessor::fullmatch_with_options and match_regex_with_options
matching pandas 2.2 Series.str.fullmatch(pat, case, na) and
Series.str.match(pat, case, na). case=false threads (?i) inline into
the anchored pattern. na handling reuses str_boolean_with_na, giving
consistent None-propagates / Some(bool)-fills semantics across the
predicate family.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
